titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 65: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 65. (A.R. No. 267 of 1911.) TILLAISTHĀNAM, TANJAVUR TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall in the Central shrine in the Ghritasthanēśvara temple.

Records two gifts of 25 kaḻañju of gold each by Teṉṉavan Pritimārāśan alias Kaṭṭi Ūraṉ and Varaguṇa Perumaṉār, the queen of Parāntaka Iḷaṅgōvēḷār for burning two perpetual lamps with two uḻakku of oil daily to the god, Mahādēva at Tiruneittānam in Poygai-nāḍu. With the 50 kaḻañju of gold the sabhaiyār of Tiruneittānam and pādamūlattār agreed to burn the two perpetual lamps daily by reclaiming ten chey of temple land (earmarked for this purpose). Among the boundaries of land, a plot of land owned by a Vishṇu temple is mentioned.
Published in S.I.I. Vol. III No. 113.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . korājakesarivarmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3 Āvatu poykai ñāṭṭut
tevatāṉan tiruneyttāṉattu mahādevarkkut teṉṉavaṉ piru
timārācaṉāyiṉa kaṭṭi Oṟṟiūraṉ nicati Uḻakku neyyāloru nontāviḷa
kkerivatākak kuṭutta poṉ 2 10 5øum parāntakaviḷaṅkoveḷār teviyā
r varakuṇaperumāṉār Oru nontāviḷakkiṉukkuk kuṭutta poṉ 2 10 5ø 2 mākap po
ṉ 5 10ø ñciṉālum tevar nilaṅkaṟaiyun tiṭaluṅ kalli nirnilamāka macakkiṉa nilat
tukkellai karaikkiḻ viṣṇubhaṭṭarākar tuṭavaikku merkkuṅ karikālak karaikku vaṭakkun tevaruṭai
ya puṉceykkaṟāykkuk kiḻakku mantaṉūr vāykkālukkut teṟku mivvicaiytta perunā
ṉkellaiyuḷḷakappaṭṭa nilam ce pattuc ceyuṅ koṇṭu nicatiyiraṇṭu nontā viḷa
kku candrādittaval Erippomāṉon tiruneytāṉattu sabhaiyum pātamulamitu panmāheśvarar rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 65 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
